---
title: "Aggregated consistency check — EDU & WI"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: cosmo
date: "2026-04-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(INLA)
library(tidyverse)
library(survey)
library(ggsci)
library(cowplot)
library(gt)

source("./_functions/functions.R")
```

# Data

```{r}
wi_edu <- read.csv("./data/wi_edu_2010_2020.csv")
```

# Helper functions

Reconstrucción de η desde el campo latente muestreado (modelos SPDE).
Para modelos no-SPDE (BYM2/beta-binomial), `Predictor:i` está disponible
directamente en el campo latente.

# Direct estimates — ENDES

```{r}
data_nest <- wi_edu %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    svy = map(data, ~ svydesign(ids = ~hv001, strata = ~hv022,
                                weights = ~hv005, data = .x, nest = TRUE)),
    edu_dep = map(svy, ~ svyby(~hv109_recat, ~hv023, design = .x,
                               svymean, keep.var = TRUE)),
    wi_dep  = map(svy, ~ svyby(~hv270_recat, ~hv023, design = .x,
                               svymean, keep.var = TRUE))
  )

direct_edu <- data_nest %>%
  select(year, edu_dep) %>% unnest(edu_dep) %>% ungroup() %>%
  select(year, hv109_recat, se)

direct_wi <- data_nest %>%
  select(year, wi_dep) %>% unnest(wi_dep) %>% ungroup() %>%
  select(year, hv270_recat, se)
```

# Aggregated consistency — EDU

```{r}
edu_model_list <- list(
  list(fit = fit_spde_edu,      data = cluster_edu,     A_obs = A_obs_edu, label = "m1"),
  list(fit = fit_spde_hier_edu, data = cluster_edu,     A_obs = A_obs_edu, label = "m2"),
  list(fit = fit_spde_pc1_edu,  data = cluster_edu_pca, A_obs = A_obs_edu, label = "m3"),
  list(fit = fit_spde_pc12_edu, data = cluster_edu_pca, A_obs = A_obs_edu, label = "m4")
)

predict_edu <- map_dfr(edu_model_list, function(m) {
  resumen_anual_samples(m$fit, m$data, spde = TRUE, A_obs = m$A_obs) %>%
    mutate(modelo = m$label)
})
```

```{r}
validation_edu <- direct_edu %>%
  full_join(predict_edu, by = "year") %>%
  mutate(
    low_direct = hv109_recat - 1.96 * se,
    upp_direct = hv109_recat + 1.96 * se,
    check      = ifelse(hv109_recat > li_95 & hv109_recat < ls_95,
                        "cumple", "no cumple"),
    se_modelo  = (ls_95 - li_95) / (2 * 1.96),
    z          = (hv109_recat - media) / sqrt(se^2 + se_modelo^2),
    p_value    = 2 * pnorm(-abs(z)),
    sig        = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "S", "NS")
  )
```

## Summary table

```{r}
validation_edu %>%
  count(modelo, check) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = check, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**EDU — years within SAE 95% CI**"))
```

## Plot

```{r}
edu_labels <- c(
  "m1" = "Me-1",
  "m2" = "Me-2",
  "m3" = "Me-3",
  "m4" = "Me-4"
)

plot_edu <-
  validation_edu %>%
  mutate(modelo = factor(modelo, levels = names(edu_labels))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = low_direct, ymax = upp_direct, fill = "Direct estimate"),
              alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = li_95, ymax = ls_95, fill = "Predicted value"),
              alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_line(aes(y = hv109_recat, color = "Direct estimate"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = media,       color = "Predicted value"), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Direct estimate" = "red4",
                                "Predicted value"  = "blue4"), name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Direct estimate" = "red4",
                                "Predicted value"  = "blue4"), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2020, limits = c(2010, 2020)) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Proportion") +
  facet_wrap(~modelo, labeller = labeller(modelo = edu_labels)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position    = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text          = element_text(size = 10))

plot_edu
```

# Aggregated consistency — WI (beta-binomial)

```{r}
wi_model_list <- list(
  list(fit = res_bb_m1$fit, data = cluster_wi,     obs_idx = 1:nrow(cluster_wi),     label = "m1"),
  list(fit = res_bb_m2$fit, data = cluster_wi,     obs_idx = 1:nrow(cluster_wi),     label = "m2"),
  list(fit = res_bb_m3$fit, data = cluster_wi_pca, obs_idx = 1:nrow(cluster_wi_pca), label = "m3"),
  list(fit = res_bb_m4$fit, data = cluster_wi_pca, obs_idx = 1:nrow(cluster_wi_pca), label = "m4")
)

predict_wi <- map_dfr(wi_model_list, function(m) {
  resumen_anual_samples(m$fit, m$data, spde = FALSE, obs_idx = m$obs_idx) %>%
    mutate(modelo = m$label)
})
```

```{r}
validation_wi <- direct_wi %>%
  full_join(predict_wi, by = "year") %>%
  mutate(
    low_direct = hv270_recat - 1.96 * se,
    upp_direct = hv270_recat + 1.96 * se,
    check      = ifelse(hv270_recat > li_95 & hv270_recat < ls_95,
                        "cumple", "no cumple"),
    se_modelo  = (ls_95 - li_95) / (2 * 1.96),
    z          = (hv270_recat - media) / sqrt(se^2 + se_modelo^2),
    p_value    = 2 * pnorm(-abs(z)),
    sig        = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "S", "NS")
  )
```

## Summary table

```{r}
validation_wi %>%
  count(modelo, check) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = check, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**WI — years within SAE 95% CI (posterior samples)**"))
```

## Plot

```{r}
wi_labels <- c(
  "m1" = "Mp-1",
  "m2" = "Mp-2",
  "m3" = "Mp-3",
  "m4" = "Mp-4"
)

plot_wi <-
  validation_wi %>%
  mutate(modelo = factor(modelo, levels = names(wi_labels))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = low_direct, ymax = upp_direct, fill = "Direct estimate"),
              alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = li_95, ymax = ls_95, fill = "Predicted value"),
              alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_line(aes(y = hv270_recat, color = "Direct estimate"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = media,       color = "Predicted value"), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Direct estimate" = "red4",
                                "Predicted value"  = "blue4"), name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Direct estimate" = "red4",
                                "Predicted value"  = "blue4"), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2020, limits = c(2010, 2020)) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Proportion") +
  facet_wrap(~modelo, labeller = labeller(modelo = wi_labels)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position    = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text          = element_text(size = 10))

plot_wi
```

# Combined figure

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=9}
g_edu  <- plot_edu + theme(legend.position = "none")
g_wi   <- plot_wi  + theme(legend.position = "none")
legend <- get_legend2(plot_edu)

plot_grid(g_edu, g_wi, legend,
          ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.9, 0.9, 0.05),
          labels = c("a", "b", ""))

ggsave("./figures/fig4.pdf", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 14, height = 9)
```

```{r}

```
